recommendations:
Jiexi "Jesse" Huang

I had the pleasure of working with Blair from 2010 to 2013 while he was Dakronics Australia's general manager. Blair essentially built Daktronics Australia's business from scratch and was instrumental in its continued success with year after year of strong sales performances that exceeded expectations. Blair was always able to see the big future and was successful in building long term customer relationships. Blair is also a great manager who ensured that projects were delivered on time and often under considerable and unforeseen challenges. Blair is easy going and one of the nicest persons I worked with at Daktronics. I recommend him without reservation.
